Name: mxc-MfoTranslationHelper
License: GNU AFFERO GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 3, November 2007
Description: Utility Addon for Znuny developers that aids in managing translations of Znuny modules. It is designed to help identify missing translations for specific packages.

Descriptions.en: Utility Addon for Znuny developers that aids in managing translations of Znuny modules. It is designed to help identify missing translations for specific packages.
Descriptions.de: Utility Addon für Znuny Entwickler zur Übersetzung von Znuny Modulen. Es hilft, fehlende Übersetzungen für angegebene Module zu identifizieren.

ChangeLogs.Text: Package renamed from TranslationHelper to mxc-MfoTranslationHelper
